title: phreatia goliathensis
intro: Phreatia goliathensis, also known as the Goliath's Phreatia, is a species of orchid native to Papua New Guinea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Phreatia goliathensis include its potential to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antioxidant and antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Phreatia goliathensis typically involve the plant's leaves or roots being extracted in hot water or oil to create a medicinal tea or tincture.
